Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Shield Icon]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Waybound ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 14''' — The Shield Icon produced a discordant note.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — The Shield Icon provides protection to Yerin.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 16''' — Ziel listened to the song of the Shield Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 18''' — The Shield Icon has no inherent connection to spatial authority.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 19''' — Ziel clung to the Shield Icon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Shield Icon sang in Ziel's heart.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 20''' — The Shield Icon approved of the death that would protect people.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 26''' — The hardiness of the Shield Icon covers Mercy.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 29''' — The Shield Icon prevented Ziel from being destroyed during the fight with his Remnant.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-12-waybound|'''Ch 30''' — The Shield Icon reinforced barriers for Ziel.}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — The Shield Icon sang to Ziel.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — The Shield Icon produces a singing sound that Ziel finds annoying.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — The song of the Shield Icon is a constant presence in Ziel's mind.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — The Shield Icon has a song that grows in volume.}}
* {{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|'''Ch 11''' — The protection of the Shield Icon can be used to keep forces locked in.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
